prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Ironleaf (feminine ranger with green half-cape and leaf brooch) and Yuna Dawncrest (masculine mage in layered blue robes with neat gloves); Yuna Ironleaf steadies a damaged metal shield on the wooden workbench while Yuna Dawncrest carefully guides a repair tool over the surface, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positions; after ten seconds Yuna Dawncrest taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Ironleaf holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
